questions.q: According to research highlighted on May 3, 2026, astronomers at the University of Warwick confirmed over 100 hidden exoplanets in NASA's TESS data using a new AI tool named what?

Astronomical research published on May 3, 2026, indicates that interstellar comet 3I/Atlas originated from a colder, dimmer star system based on high levels of which hydrogen isotope found in its water?
A study published in the Proceedings of the Royal Society B on May 3, 2026, settled a long-running behavioral debate by confirming what surprising mathematical talent in honeybees?
options: They comprehend the concept of zero
